name: ASUS PRIME H610I-PLUS D4 LGA 1700 (Intel 12th & 13th Gen & Intel vPro) mini ITX Motherboard (PCIe 4.0, DDR4, USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-A, M.2 slot, 1 Gb Lan, DP/HDMI/D-Sub, V-M.2 slot (Key E), Q-LED)
